arc_function: Fallback aggregation due LLM structure issue.
state_progression: LLM output fallback for this volume.

arc_function: Scholarly apparatus and documentary conclusion—closing volume with evidentiary documentation, testimonial consolidation, and retrospective moral accounting across occupation and liberation timelines
dominant_engine: Documentary-historical testimonial engine; scholarly citation apparatus as primary narrative structure; archival integration providing evidentiary closure while maintaining interpretive openness
state_progression: Occupation-period vignettes documented through endnote apparatus
Wartime complicity and resistance examined through intersecting biographical threads
Post-war reintegration and intelligence processing through fictional intermediaries
Historical reckoning through location-convergence (hotel) and figure-intersection (aristocratic, political, cultural)
Bibliographic apparatus providing source trail and scholarly credibility
Visual documentation corroborating textual narrative across liberation phases

turning_points.function: Endnote system crystallizes documentary authority—thematic organization by subject (art, fashion, correspondents) provides closure structure while maintaining archival openness

Retrospective reinterpretation recontextualizes earlier investigations—parallel structure (scientific program / human atrocities) provides moral counterpoint while fictional intermediaries enable interpretive distance
Location-convergence finale—intersecting aristocratic and political figures converge on hotel as vehicle for retrospective moral accounting through literary legacy

reusable_mechanisms: Testimonial frame—firsthand accounts quoted for experiential immediacy
Retrospective reinterpretation—earlier events recontextualized by new documentary evidence
Parallel structure—investigation mirroring investigation provides thematic counterpoint
Fictional intermediary—real historical figures processed through interpretive proxy scenes
Intersecting biographical threads converging on single location
Endnote cross-referencing system linking claims to sources
Photo caption as historical witness providing visual corroboration
Date-stamped visual anchors for temporal grounding
Juxtaposition across social spheres (military, civilian, cultural) in liberation documentation
failure_modes: Nonfiction with fictionalized dialogue passages creates authenticity risk
Testimonial claims from memory present verification challenges
Source material primarily bibliographic apparatus rather than narrative content
No character arcs or plot progression in documentary sections
Academic apparatus functions as closure but lacks emotional engagement mechanics
Citation-heavy format may impede reader momentum
Three-chapter span exceeds typical chapter card granularity
llm_fallback applied to chapters 26-28 preventing complete analysis

craft_profile.pov_distance: Third-person omniscient with documentary authority; scholarly register alternates with experiential testimony
craft_profile.sentence_rhythm: Citation-heavy declarative passages alternate with kinetic dialogue reconstruction; short testimonial statements contrasted with complex contextual subordinate clauses
craft_profile.paragraphing: Discrete endnote entries function as paragraphs in scholarly sections; block dialogue with attribution tags in scene passages
craft_profile.dialogue_method: Direct quotation from primary sources anchors historical claims; fictionalized exchanges labeled with documentary sources
craft_profile.description_method: Sensory specificity deployed in testimony passages only; atmospheric detail subordinated to evidentiary purpose
craft_profile.exposition_method: Inline citations serve dual attribution and worldbuilding function; no separate information dumps
craft_profile.hook_delivery: Chapter titles provide thematic framing; quoted statements plunge into specific documented exchanges
craft_profile.transition_method: Thematic parallels (scientific investigation / atrocity investigation) provide connective tissue; physical location shifts handled through returning residents
do_not_copy: Specific proper nouns (historical figures, locations, archival references)
Proprietary citation formats and bibliographic entries
Copyrighted image credits and Getty identifiers
Quote length and citation density in fictional reconstructions
